sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6019" key="a)mfi/plous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίπλους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ουν</itype>, <sense id="n6019.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">which may be sailed round,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γῆ,</foreign> of islands, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
